raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee zehlehs no Midija-
nas/ un nahze us Pahraru/ un
nehme Wihrus ar fewim no Pah-
rana/ un nahze us Egipti pee
Waraüś/ toEgiptes Kehniku/un
tas dewe winnam weenu Nam-
mu/ un fohtija tam Usturrefscha-
nu/ un dewe winnam Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Adads atradde leelu
Schehlastibu preeſch Waraüś/
un tas dewe winnam fawas
Seetwas Tapenes tahs Kehninin-
nes Mahfu par Seewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Tapenes Mahfa dsem-
deja winnam Dehlu Gennbats
Wahrda/ to paschu usaudsina-
ja Tapenes Wardins Namâ/ un
Gennbats bija Waraüś Nam-
mâ starp Waraüś Dehlecem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Adads eekſch E-
giptes dsirdeja/ ka Dahwids ar
faweem Tehweem bija aisinidſis/
un ka Joabs tas Karra Leels-
Kungs bija nomirris/ tad tazzija
Adads us Waraii: Atlaid man-
ni/ ka es fawa Semmê remu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Waraüś fazzija us
to: Kas tew pee mannim Wai-
nas/ un rangi/ tu gribbi fawa
Semmê eet? wiꞥſch fazzija: Ne
neeka/ tatthu atlaid mann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Deews likke ar prett win-
n weenn Prettineeku zeltees/
Diesonu Elijada Dehlu / kas no
fawa Kunga Adad-Esera ta Keh-
nika no Jobas bija behdsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un bija arridsan prett
winnu Wihrus fapulzinajs/ un
kūā par Wirfueeku pahr Sirro-
tajeem/ kad Dahwids tohs no-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch bija Israë
Prettineeks/ kamehr Salama-
dsihwoja. Un tas bija pahr-
pahr to Laununu/ ko Adads da-
rija/ un tam reebahs prett Is-
etu/ un waldija pahr Sihrijju
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl bija Jerobeat
Neebata Dehls weens Getwa-
ris no Zaredas/ Salama-
Kalps/ un winna Mahteı b
Zerua Wahrdı/ weena Atre-
ne/ tas pazehle arri fawu Ra-
fu prett to Kehniku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tchi irr ta Leeta/ par-
wiꞥſch to Rohku prett to keh-
nu pazehle : Kad Salama-
Millu taifija/ tad aistais-
wiꞥſch weenn Zaurnmu fan-
Tehwa Dahwida Pilli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Wihrs Jerol
ams bija fifprs warrens Zilwe-
Rad Salamans to Butti bij u-
dsejs/ ka tas Strahdneeks 3-
weks bija/ tad eczehle wiꞥſch
pahr wisfu Nastu ta Namu-
Jahsepa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas notiffahs tam-
Laikā/ ka Jerobeams isgabje-
Jerusalemes/ tad fastappe ta-
tas Praweets Akijus tas Sil-
niteris usZelta/ un wiꞥſch bij ja-
nu Mehteli aplizzis/ un tee bi-
abbi diwi ween us Laukn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Akijus Rehme to ja-
nu Mehteli/ kas winnam Mu-
gurā bija/ un faplohsija to div-
padesmite Gabbalos.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
